title: Status Editing Screen not able to display all status information
excerpt: Once there is more then two columns of Status items, you are not able to see everything to be able to alter orders, etc of the status items. (see Image) Left side options cannot be accessed or moved easily.

posts.author: Terry.Heard (Terry Heard)
posts.cookedHtml: Once there is more then two columns of Status items, you are not able to see everything to be able to alter orders, etc of the status items. (see Image) Left side options cannot be accessed or moved easily.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Terry,

I have tested this on my end and cannot reproduce this behaviour. Can you please let me know if you experience the same issue in an incognito window? Additionally, can you please try duplicating the status column - does this change anything? Thanks

posts.author: Terry.Heard (Terry Heard)
posts.cookedHtml: Able to Replicate every time. Please see link.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much Terry - I will reach out to our internal team, and send you a private message about this
